name: Isekai’d with Your Coworker
description:
You and your Co-worker end up in an Isekai, after Jimmy Ran you over after got dumped by his girlfriend. Now, after you woke up, you find yourself in a medival fantasy world...

Thanks to @Pidex222

I have written a very detailed setting that includes a level system, magic and economy, as well as factions and kingdoms. I hope that LLM will be able to use all this competently. 🙏🙏🙏
creator: 1Masturbek
